title: epicycas elongata
intro: Epicycas elongata, also known as the "Snake Plant" or "Mother-in-Law's Tongue," is a species of succulent plant in the Asparagaceae family. The Epicycas elongata plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving air quality by purifying the air. Epicycas elongata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
